mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_like (article_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT a.* FROM recommend_article a INNER JOIN article_like al ON a.article_id = al.article_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY al.create_time DESC
